note: The indexer, standing in for one that does not exist yet. Every id below is a REAL item on chain 16602, under creator 1's consignment (tranche 1, root 0x65b6e563…). This file carries only what the chain does not and never will: which items belong together, what a human calls them, and which variant of a design each tagged unit is. Price, state, owner and location are the chain's — read them from the ledger, never from here.

collections.name: Local Wood
collections.blurb: Timber cut and distilled within a day's drive of the shop. One design, several bottles — the wood decides the note, the size decides the bottle.

items.name: Oak Wood
items.blurb: Dry oak over a low resin. The first thing the line was known for.

items.name: Oak Wood
items.blurb: The same distillation, half the bottle.

items.name: Iroko Smoke
items.blurb: Iroko heartwood, smoked rather than pressed. Heavier than the oak and slower to leave.

items.name: Iroko Smoke
items.blurb: Iroko heartwood, smoked rather than pressed.

items.name: Cedar Dusk
items.blurb: Cedar with the sweetness left in — the only one in the line that reads warm.

collections.name: Harmattan
collections.blurb: The dry season, bottled: dust, cold morning air, and the amber that sits under both. Made once a year, when the wind is actually blowing.

items.name: Dust & Amber
items.blurb: Amber carried on something powdery. The line's most argued-about bottle.

items.name: Cold Morning
items.blurb: Air before sunrise in December — mineral, almost cold to smell.

items.name: Dry Grass
items.blurb: Cut grass left in the sun until it turns to hay.

collections.name: Lagoon
collections.blurb: Water at the edge of the city. Salt, rain on warm concrete, and the green underneath it.

items.name: Salt Air
items.blurb: Salt without the citrus everybody else puts under it.

items.name: Ikoyi Rain
items.blurb: The first ten minutes of rain on hot ground.

items.name: Ikoyi Rain
items.blurb: The first ten minutes of rain on hot ground.

items.name: Tide Line
items.blurb: Green water and wet rope. The last one she made before the consignment was posted.
